== Chichikaka ♀ ==
Living at the bottom of a river, she comes ashore when craving human flesh.

=== Begin Friendship ===
To obtain Chichikaka, complete the [[Koryeo]] Key Clue "Super Bio Weapon"

===☆☆☆ > ★☆☆===
After 3 letters back and forth, Chichikaka will arrive at Home Base and gift {{RewardIconWithLink|Alien Hookworm|black|Zombie Form}}.

===★☆☆ > ★★☆===
After 3 letters back and forth, Chichikaka will arrive at Home Base and gift Body in Slime (Soul of Hitman No. 2, [[Gene Simulation|Biochem Men]] Gene Seg. +5).

===★★☆ > ★★★===
After 3 letters back and forth, Chichikaka will move in permanently with her minion, Chika.

==Rent==
[[File:Chichikaka rent.png|frameless|left]]
Chichikaka's rent is collected on '''Tuesday''' and appears as a dinner plate on the floor to the left.

 '''Normal Rent''': {{RewardIconWithText|Green Organ Slime, +10|green}}

 '''Rare Rent''': {{RewardIconWithLink|Salamander's Tail|blue}}

 '''Lv. 10 Rent''': {{RewardIconGeneSegment|Meat Chef, +1}}. Once 5 are obtained, this will no longer show up.

{{Clear}}

== Relics==
Upgrading these will earn Evolution Chests!

{| class="mw-collapsible wikitable"  
!Relic Tier
!Reward
|-
|★
|Evolution Chest +20
|-
|★★
|Evolution Chest +20
|-
|★★★
|Evolution Chest +20
|-
|★★★★
|Evolution Chest +40
|-
|★★★★★
|Evolution Chest +60
|-
|★★★★★★
|Evolution Chest +80
|}

{| class="wiki-table" style="width:100%; text-align:center;" 
!style="background-color:var(--blue-bg);"|{{Reimg|Big Fish Bone}}{{Relink|Big Fish Bone}}
!style="background-color:var(--blue-bg);"|{{Reimg|Eye of Medusa}}{{Relink|Eye of Medusa}}
!style="background-color:var(--purple-bg);"|{{Reimg|Tyr's Arm}}{{Relink|Tyr's Arm}}
!style="background-color:var(--purple-bg);"|{{Reimg|Lionheart}}{{Relink|Lionheart}}
|-
!style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);"|{{Reimg|Golden Scarab}}{{Relink|Golden Scarab}}
!style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);"|{{Reimg|Boltzmann Brain}}{{Relink|Boltzmann Brain}}
|}

==Chichikaka's Mouth==
For Chichikaka, to live means to look for food, that giant mouth is the essence of their body!

{| class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wikitable"
!Level
!Research Skill<br>Required
!B-tad Cost
!Skill 1
!Skill 2
|-
|1||0||0||Snail CIV +5||Snail ATK +5
|-
|2||180||2k||Snail CIV +10||Snail ATK +10
|-
|3||190||4.5k||Snail CIV +15||Snail ATK +15
|-
|4||200||8k||Snail CIV +20||Snail ATK +20
|-
|5||210||12.5k||Snail CIV +25||Snail ATK +25
|-
|6||220||18k||Snail CIV +30||Snail ATK +30
|-
|7||230||24.5k||Snail CIV +35||Snail ATK +35
|-
|8||240||32k||Snail CIV +40||Snail ATK +40
|-
|9||250||40.5k||Snail CIV +45||Snail ATK +45 
|-
|10||260||50k||Snail CIV +50||Snail ATK +50 
|-
|11||270||60.5k||Snail CIV +55||Snail ATK +55
|-
|12||285||72k||Snail CIV +60||Snail ATK +60
|-
|13||300||84.5k||Snail CIV +65||Snail ATK +65
|-
|14||315||98k||Snail CIV +70||Snail ATK +70
|-
|15||330||112k||Snail CIV +75||Snail ATK +75
|-
|16||345||123k||Snail CIV +80||Snail ATK +80
|-
|17||360||144k||Snail CIV +85||Snail ATK +85
|-
|18||375||162k||Snail CIV +90||Snail ATK +90
|-
|19||390||180k||Snail CIV +95||Snail ATK +95
|-
|20||400||200k||Snail CIV +100||Snail ATK +100
|-
|21||420||220k||Snail CIV +105||Snail ATK +105
|-
|22||440||242k||Snail CIV +110||Snail ATK +110
|-
|23||460||264k||Snail CIV +115||Snail ATK +115
|-
|24||480||285k||Snail CIV +120||Snail ATK +120
|-
|25||500||309k||Snail CIV +125||Snail ATK +125
|-
|26||520||333k||Snail CIV +130||Snail ATK +130
|-
|27||540||357k||Snail CIV +135||Snail ATK +135
|-
|28||560||381k||Snail CIV +140||Snail ATK +140
|-
|29||580||405k||Snail CIV +145||Snail ATK +145
|-
|30||600||429k||Snail CIV +150||Snail ATK +150
|}

==Commander==
A good commander can make the troops more effective!

Commander can only be leveled up as far as Chichikaka's Mouth is.
 
{| class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wikitable"
!Level
!B-tad Cost
!Skill 1
!Skill 2
|-
|1||0||Mutant Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Chikas in battle, Troop ATK +10
|-
|2||4k||Mutant Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Chikas in battle, Troop ATK +20
|-
|3||6k||Mutant Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Chikas in battle, Troop ATK +30
|-
|4||8k||Mutant Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Chikas in battle, Troop ATK +40
|-
|5||10k||Mutant Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Chikas in battle, Troop ATK +50
|-
|6||12k||Mutant Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Chikas in battle, Troop ATK +60
|-
|7||14k||Mutant Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Chikas in battle, Troop ATK +70
|-
|8||16k||Mutant Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Chikas in battle, Troop ATK +80 
|-
|9||18k||Mutant Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Chikas in battle, Troop ATK +90
|-
|10||20k||Mutant Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Chikas in battle, Troop ATK +100
|-
|11||22k||Mutant Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Chikas in battle, Troop ATK +110
|-
|12||24k||Mutant Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Chikas in battle, Troop ATK +120
|-
|13||26k||Mutant Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Chikas in battle, Troop ATK +130
|-
|14||28k||Mutant Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Chikas in battle, Troop ATK +140
|-
|15||30k||Mutant Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Chikas in battle, Troop ATK +150
|-
|16||32k||Mutant Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Chikas in battle, Troop ATK +160
|-
|17||34k||Mutant Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Chikas in battle, Troop ATK +170
|-
|18||36k||Mutant Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Chikas in battle, Troop ATK +180
|-
|19||38k||Mutant Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Chikas in battle, Troop ATK +190
|-
|20||40k||Mutant Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Chikas in battle, Troop ATK +200
|-
|21||42k||Mutant Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Chikas in battle, Troop ATK +210
|-
|22||44k||Mutant Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Chikas in battle, Troop ATK +220
|-
|23||46k||Mutant Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Chikas in battle, Troop ATK +230
|-
|24||48k||Mutant Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Chikas in battle, Troop ATK +240
|-
|25||50k||Mutant Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Chikas in battle, Troop ATK +250
|-
|26||55k||Mutant Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Chikas in battle, Troop ATK +260
|-
|27||60k||Mutant Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Chikas in battle, Troop ATK +270
|-
|28||65k||Mutant Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Chikas in battle, Troop ATK +280
|-
|29||70k||Mutant Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Chikas in battle, Troop ATK +290
|-
|30||75k||Mutant Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Chikas in battle, Troop ATK +300
|}

==Research Ability==
Below is a table of the research manual cost to upgrade each research gene. Chichikaka specializes in '''Mutant Genes''' and therefore the research manual cost for the Mutant Gene is halved. 

{| class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wikitable"
!Level
!Manuals Required 
|-
|1-10||1
|-
|11-20||2
|-
|21-30||3
|-
|31-40||4
|-
|61-70||20
|-
|71-80||40
|-
|81-90||60
|-
|91-95||80
|-
|97||200
|-
|98||400
|-
|99||600
|-
|100||800
|}

==Minion - Chika==
Originating from the larvae of Chichikaka, they have nearly identical genetic sequences with Chichikaka. So it can be inferred that they are reproduced by self-replication...

===Special Ability - Radiation===
Per 10 Chikas in battle, Troop Earth DMG +1 (multiplied by minion level)

===Minion Relics ===
Upgrading these relics will buff your Chikas!

{| class="mw-collapsible wikitable"
!Name
!★☆☆☆☆☆
!★★☆☆☆☆
!★★★☆☆☆
!★★★★☆☆
!★★★★★☆
!★★★★★★
|-
!style="background-color:var(--blue-bg);" |{{reimg|Big Fish Bone}}<br>{{relink|Big Fish Bone}}
|HP +1%
|DEF +1%
|ATK +1%
|RUSH +1% 
|
|
|-
!style="background-color:var(--blue-bg);" |{{reimg|Eye of Medusa}}<br>{{relink|Eye of Medusa}}
|HP +1%
|DEF +1%
|ATK +1%
|RUSH +1%
|
|
|-
!style="background-color:var(--purple-bg);" |{{reimg|Tyr's Arm}}<br>{{relink|Tyr's Arm}}
|HP +2%
|DEF +2%
|ATK +2%
|RUSH +2%
|All Stats +3%
|
|-
!style="background-color:var(--purple-bg);" |{{reimg|Lionheart}}<br>{{relink|Lionheart}}
|HP +2%
|DEF +2%
|ATK +2%
|RUSH +2%
|All Stats +3%
|
|-
!style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);" |{{reimg|Golden Scarab}}<br>{{relink|Golden Scarab}}
|HP +4%
|HP +4%
|HP +4%
|HP +4%
|HP +4%
|HP +4%
|-
!style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);" |{{reimg|Golden Finger}}<br>{{relink|Golden Finger}}
|ATK +4% 
|ATK +4%
|ATK +4%
|ATK +4%
|ATK +4%
|ATK +4%
|-
!style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);" |{{reimg|Boltzmann Brain}}<br>{{relink|Boltzmann Brain}}
|DEF +4%
|DEF +4%
|DEF +4%
|DEF +4%
|DEF +4%
|DEF +4%
|-
!style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);" |{{reimg|Einstein's Brain}}<br>{{relink|Einstein's Brain}}
|RUSH +4%
|RUSH +4%
|RUSH +4%
|RUSH +4%
|RUSH +4%
|RUSH +4%
|}

[[Category:Partners]]
[[Category:ATK Boost]]
[[Category:Minion ATK Boost]]
